candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total current assets line.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Explicit cash and cash equivalents line on the balance sheet; directly matches CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of year
candidates.why: Beginning cash from cash flow statement, not the balance sheet stock at year-end.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line; duplicate label appears, but final_choice lists the exact label once only.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total current liabilities line.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: Candidate list item for current maturities, but preview shows only zero/blank and it may not represent the reported current borrowing total across years.
Appears in the current liabilities section above lease liabilities and before Total Current Liabilities; best match for current borrowings/short-term debt, excluding leases.
Possible component of current borrowings in some years, but using it alongside total Loans could double count; inferior if total Loans exists.
Potential short-term debt component, but not consistently populated and may be included within current Loans.

variables.notes: Chose 'Loans' from the current liabilities section as the best reported short-term debt line. Excluded 'Finance lease liabilities' per rule and avoided component rows to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit current tax liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches taxes payable/current tax payable.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Explicit total net PPE line; preferred over component or gross/accumulated depreciation lines.
Gross tangible assets could conceptually relate, but the line is not populated and net PPE is preferred when available.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Used the total net PPE line, which is preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Explicit net operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement; directly matches OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Operating activities before financial items and taxes
candidates.why: Operating subtotal, not the final net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the standard net cash flow from operating activities line.
